Motion To Quash Subpoenas For Medical Records And Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KAYLA SMITH's Motion To Quash Subpoenas For Medical Records And Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF' MOTION TO QUASH THE MEDICAL SUBPOENA OF PLAINTIFFS HEALTH RECORDS IS GRANTED. THE SCOPE OF THE SUBPOENA IS TOO BROAD AND THERE IS INSUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT THE SOUGHT FOR EVIDENCE OVERCOMES THE PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT TO PRIVACY.

NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED ON ANY PARTY OR THEIR ATTORNEYS.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIEVER A COPY TO THE COURT BY EMAIL SENT TO rennepar85@gmail.com.
